production_behavior_changes.change: Fixed a double-Unlock(leftID)/never-Unlock(leafID) bug in the left.NextLeaf != leafID orphan-guard's retry branch (present unchanged since commit b31328f). Now unlocks leftID, leafID, parentID exactly once each, matching every other return path in the function.
production_behavior_changes.risk: low: narrower than the surrounding, already-verified orphan-guard logic; only touches latch bookkeeping on an error/retry path, not the borrow/merge decision itself.
production_behavior_changes.discovered_via: writing TestRepairEmptyLeafOrphanRegression and reading the exact branch line-by-line, not assumed

production_behavior_changes.change: No logic change. Added two nil-in-production test-only hooks (splitPublishHook, prePropagateHook) at the leaf-split and internal-split sites, mirroring the existing crabRetryHook/optimisticReadHook/unlockOrderHook idiom.
production_behavior_changes.risk: zero: hooks are nil by default and only invoked as an extra conditional no-op in production.

cross_stream_scope_note: Concurrent agents in this run are working on engine/split and engine/catalog; this subtask touches ONLY the four listed engine/btree files plus this run's own .cdr/runs directory, per explicit scope isolation instructions.
backward_compatibility: No public API change. No existing test behavior changed except the one delete.go bugfix, which only affects a previously-panicking/deadlocking path that had no prior test coverage.
